Bagaimana cara terbaik menuju Danau Toba: What is the best way to get to Lake Toba from Kualanamu Airport (KNO)?
Cara terbaik dan paling nyaman adalah me: The best and most comfortable way is using private transfer services (premium fleet with private driver) provided by Sujai Laketoba. The road trip takes about 3.5 to 4 hours via the Medan-Tebing Tinggi toll road, then continues to Parapat, the main gateway to Samosir Island.
Apakah makanan halal mudah ditemukan di: Is halal food easy to find around Lake Toba?
Ya, sangat mudah. Di Parapat dan Pulau S: Yes, very easy. In Parapat and Samosir Island (especially the tourist areas of Tuk-tuk and Tomok), there are many local Muslim restaurants that are certified halal or serve Muslim-friendly menus such as grilled carp, ayam penyet, and traditional Minang/Padang dishes. Sujai Laketoba drivers and guides will always direct you to chosen halal dining places.
Mata uang apa yang digunakan, dan apakah: What currency is used, and are credit cards accepted?
Mata uang resmi yang digunakan adalah Ru: The official currency used is the Indonesian Rupiah (IDR). In major cities like Medan, international credit/debit cards are widely accepted. However, around Lake Toba, it is recommended to carry Rupiah cash for small transactions at food stalls or souvenir shops. You can also make international bank transfer payments via Wise.
Kapan waktu terbaik untuk berkunjung ke: When is the best time to visit Lake Toba?
Danau Toba indah sepanjang tahun karena: Lake Toba is beautiful year-round due to its cool highland climate. The best time is between May and September when rainfall tends to be lower, providing clear skies and blue lake views. Avoid national holiday seasons if you prefer a peaceful atmosphere.
